mapper.select: SELECT * FROM post ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM post WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM post WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM post WHERE author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM post WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (title, content, summary, author_id, category_id, status, view_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{authorId}, #{categoryId}, #{status}, #{viewCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
